tool_args.label: B44 Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: B44 Nostrand/Rogers Avenues Select Bus Service Begins November 17, 2013

payload.route_name: B44 Nostrand/Rogers Avenues Select Bus Service
payload.description: B44 SBS runs primarily north-south along Nostrand Avenue. Northbound B44 SBS travels on Rogers Avenue instead of New York Avenue for faster service.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B44 Nostrand/Rogers Avenues Select Bus Service Begins November 17, 2013
B44 Select Bus Service route running primarily north-south along Nostrand Avenue
Northbound B44 SBS will travel on Rogers instead of New York Avenue for faster service.

tool_args.label: B44 Local
tool_args.raw_text: B44 local service remains the same

payload.description: B44 local service remains the same. Northbound B44 local will remain on New York Avenue and continues to serve all stops on New York Avenue.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B44 local service remains the same
Northbound B44 Local will remain on NEW YORK AVENUE
The B44 local will continue to serve all stops on New York Avenue

tool_args.label: B44 Limited
tool_args.raw_text: B44 SBS replaces B44 limited bus service

payload.description: B44 SBS replaces B44 limited bus service.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B44 SBS replaces B44 limited bus service

tool_args.label: B49
tool_args.raw_text: the B49 will provide local service on Rogers Avenue

payload.description: B49 will provide local service on Rogers Avenue.

evidence_refs.source_quote: the B49 will provide local service on Rogers Avenue

payload.description: SBS route running primarily north-south along Nostrand Avenue. Ongoing street reconstruction from Flushing to Atlantic Avenues will build SBS stations at DeKalb Avenue and Fulton Street, as well as bus lanes.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B44 Select Bus Service route running primarily north-south along Nostrand Avenue
SBS service will operate through the ongoing street reconstruction on Nostrand Avenue from Flushing to Atlantic Avenues

payload.description: Northbound B44 SBS travels on Rogers Avenue instead of New York Avenue for faster service. B49 provides local service on Rogers Avenue.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Northbound B44 SBS will travel on Rogers instead of New York Avenue for faster service.

payload.description: B44 Nostrand/Rogers Avenues Select Bus Service begins November 17, 2013

evidence_refs.source_quote: B44 Nostrand/Rogers Avenues Select Bus Service Begins November 17, 2013

payload.location_text: Nostrand Avenue and Rogers Avenue, Brooklyn
payload.description: Bus lanes bring faster and more reliable service. Most bus lanes are one lane out from the curb, in effect from 7 AM to 7 PM, Mon-Fri. Some areas have different hours.

normalized_location.raw_text: Nostrand Avenue and Rogers Avenue, Brooklyn

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus lanes bring faster and more reliable service to the 40,000 riders of the B44 bus
Most bus lanes are one lane out from the curb, and are in effect from 7 AM to 7 PM, Mon-Fri
This project will build SBS stations at DeKalb Avenue and Fulton Street, as well as bus lanes.

payload.description: Faster boarding with sidewalk fare payment. Pay on the sidewalk at a Metrocard or coin machine before boarding. Take your receipt and keep it while you ride. Board from any of three doors.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Faster boarding with sidewalk fare payment
Pay on the sidewalk at a Metrocard or coin machine (shown above) before boarding the bus

payload.description: Wider sidewalks at SBS stations with room for trees and bus shelters, and higher curbs for easier bus boarding.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Wider sidewalks at SBS stations with room for trees and bus shelters, and higher curbs for easier bus boarding

payload.description: Faster, easier boarding on new low floor, three door buses.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Faster, easier boarding on new low floor, three door buses

payload.description: NYC enforces bus lanes with video cameras and increased police enforcement. $115 to $150 fine if you drive, park, or stand in an active bus lane. A roving team of fare inspectors board buses to check receipts. Passengers without a valid receipt are subject to a $100 fine.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Video cameras. Increased police enforcement
$115 to $150 fine if you drive, park, or stand in an active bus lane.
Passengers without a valid receipt are subject to a $100 fine.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.description: To reduce truck doubleparking in commercial areas of Nostrand Avenue, the curb will be reserved for truck loading and unloading: 10 AM to noon on the east side of the street, Noon to 2 PM on the west side.

evidence_refs.source_quote: To reduce truck doubleparking in commercial areas of Nostrand Avenue, the curb will be reserved for truck loading and unloading: 10 AM to noon on the east side of the street, Noon to 2 PM on the west side

tool_args.label: B44 Nostrand/Rogers Avenues Select Bus Service

payload.project_name: B44 Nostrand/Rogers Avenues Select Bus Service
payload.description: B44 Select Bus Service launching November 17, 2013 along Nostrand/Rogers Avenues, replacing B44 limited bus service. Includes bus lanes, off-board fare payment, wider sidewalks, and new low-floor three-door buses.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B44 Nostrand/Rogers Avenues Select Bus Service Begins November 17, 2013
Bus lanes bring faster and more reliable service to the 40,000 riders of the B44 bus
Faster boarding with sidewalk fare payment
Wider sidewalks at SBS stations with room for trees and bus shelters, and higher curbs for easier bus boarding
Faster, easier boarding on new low floor, three door buses
B44 SBS replaces B44 limited bus service
